purpose: Machine-readable topology and dispatch-pattern registry for screenplay-oriented subagent systems.

topologies.use_when: One owner must keep the route stable while a small specialist ring handles bounded tasks.
topologies.context_rule: Owner holds truth packet; specialists receive only task packets.

topologies.use_when: A room-like system needs one captain plus multiple nested specialty lanes.
topologies.context_rule: Only lane leads see merged lane state; room members stay packet-scoped.

topologies.use_when: The system must preserve disagreement before final synthesis.
topologies.context_rule: Each lens gets the same frozen packet; only merge board sees all outputs together.

topologies.use_when: Story and visual lanes must co-evolve without collapsing into one another.
topologies.context_rule: Shared truth packet is frozen; each lane gets only one adjunct bundle beyond it.

topologies.use_when: One message spine must produce multiple platform or campaign variants.
topologies.context_rule: Every lane inherits the same message memo and locked constraints, nothing more.

topologies.use_when: Narrative, state logic, and QA must stay coupled in interactive work.
topologies.context_rule: Shared branch truth packet plus lane-specific packets only.

topologies.use_when: A task has a clear contract and should be implemented with spec review first, quality review second.
topologies.context_rule: Implementer receives task packet; spec reviewer receives packet plus contract; quality reviewer receives approved artifact only after spec pass.

phase_patterns.use_when: The task needs contrasted options before a lock.
The task has a specific output contract and overbuild risk.
Narrative and visual reasoning must evolve together.
The job needs controlled variation under one core message.
Interactive logic must be tested before narrative scale expands.

dispatch_rules: Route first, then team mode, then cast, then topology.
Do not let reference personas become default merge owners.
Keep one explicit convergence owner whenever more than one lane exists.
If context budgets start widening without changing the answer, collapse the topology.
Prefer fresh_task_review_loop for repo asset implementation or any task where contract drift is expensive.
